steps.title: Identify variable meanings
steps.content:
In the equation $y = 0.25x^2 - 6.5x + 64.25$:
  • $x$ represents the number of days after the company went public
  • $y$ represents the estimated stock price in dollars

steps.title: Interpret the ordered pair (1, 58)
steps.content: The ordered pair $(x, y) = (1, 58)$ means when $x = 1$ and $y = 58$. Since $x = 1$ day and $y = 58$ dollars, this tells us that one day after the company went public, the estimated stock price is 58 dollars. That matches choice A — A is correct.
